updates.1.0.0:
# Project's first steps

`ver 1.0.0 - 20.04.2026`

We are pleased to launch this project as an aid in planning your major work, academic, and personal tasks. Good luck!

## Features
 - Create and manage entities
 - Build hierarchical trees and branches with your tasks
 - Track progress and statuses
 - Export / Import data (JSON format)
 - Dark / Light theme support
 - Multi-language support (English, Russian)
 - Real-time graph visualization
updates.1.1.0:
# New features

`ver 1.1.0 - 21.04.2026`

Entity Graph now have more useful features for the best productivity.

## Features
- Added a Markdown viewer to the point and subbranch description fields
- Added a Markdown editor to the point and subbranch description input fields
- Added a list of updates to the Home page
updates.1.2.0:
# New features

`ver 1.2.0 - 22.04.2026`

Entity Graph now have more useful features for the best productivity.

## Features
- Added the ability to change the order of branches
- Added the ability to change the order of points
- Added the ability to change the order of subbranches
